result:
All 70 matches are genuine, unconditional, non-commented `#include "server.h"` lines at the start of each line — no false positives.

## 結果:70 個 .c 檔案直接 `#include "server.h"`

**方法**:此問題(哪些檔案 include 某 header)clangd 沒有對應的語意查詢原語,依照 lsp-nav playbook 指示改用 grep,並同時檢查了 `"server.h"` 與 `".../server.h"` 兩種寫法(後者 0 筆,確認專案內全部使用相對路徑 `"server.h"` 這一種拼法,無遺漏)。

**完整清單(70 檔,依 src/ 內字母排序)**:
acl.c, aof.c, bio.c, bitops.c, blocked.c, call_reply.c, childinfo.c, cluster.c, cluster_asm.c, cluster_legacy.c, commands.c, config.c, connection.c, crc16.c, db.c, debug.c, defrag.c, entry.c, estore.c, eval.c, evict.c, expire.c, fwtree.c, gcra.c, hotkeys.c, hyperloglog.c, iothread.c, keymeta.c, latency.c, lazyfree.c, logreqres.c, lolwut.c, lolwut5.c, lolwut6.c, lolwut8.c, memory_prefetch.c, module.c, multi.c, networking.c, notify.c, object.c, pubsub.c, rdb.c, redis-check-aof.c, redis-check-rdb.c, replication.c, resp_parser.c, rio.c, script.c, script_lua.c, sentinel.c, server.c, slowlog.c, socket.c, sort.c, sparkline.c, sparsearray.c, syncio.c, t_array.c, t_hash.c, t_list.c, t_set.c, t_stream.c, t_string.c, t_zset.c, threads_mngr.c, timeout.c, tls.c, tracking.c, unix.c

備註:所有匹配都是每個檔案裡唯一一行、無條件(非註解、非 `#if 0` 包裹)的 `#include "server.h"`,已逐一核對過(見上方 grep -n 輸出),因此每個檔案只計 1 次,總數為 70。此為 grep 結果(檔案系統層級的文字比對),與 compile_commands.json 涵蓋範圍無關,不受單一建置組態限制。
